claim: Ancient Yi octal-place tables instantiate a retained finite carrier with LSD-first readout, local successor/carry refinement, all-7 completion, and lift into a higher place-domain.
proven_here: LSD-first examples evaluate exactly to the extracted decimal values.
The normalized successor/carry rule increments retained value by one.
All-7 domain completion forces higher-place opening: 7..7 -> 0..01.
Scalar/low-digit/display projections lose active place-domain state.
next_target: Phase 3 v5: Wilhelm Six-Line Phase Ladder
